title: Which Eva DVDs have the booklets
display_title: Which Eva DVDs have the booklets
wikitext:
[]: Which Eva DVDs have the booklets?             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Nov 21, 2013 4:02 pm I'm referring to these booklets that came (at least with) individual Platinum DVD releases . Do they come with any collection?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Nov 21, 2013 4:09 pm The initial "limited" release. The one that came out on 7 individual DVDs. The box looks like this: http://imgc.classistatic.com/cps/poc/131025/309r1/3726im8_27.jpeg http://g-ecx.images-amazon.com/images/G/01/ciu/cc/0e/5ce962e89da048c3382b2110.L._SY300_.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Nov 21, 2013 4:15 pm My R2 tin box has a single 60-page booklet containing all the articles listed there plus a big glossary; also 3 stiff picture cards (Rei, Asuka, Misato): SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Nov 21, 2013 4:19 pm Does anyone know if the North American release has a booklet? I think this is pretty much the only version I don't own.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Nov 21, 2013 4:34 pm Thanks a lot people! I've decided to FINALLY buy Eva DVDs since BDs seem to take years to come out and I only own Mangle's EoE as is. Problem is if at all feasible I'd like to get those booklets too but everyone I asked gave different answers which releases have them. EGF knows the best, unsurprisingly. Thanks. Hmm, do you think I'd have any luck tracking down the limited edition releases these days without paying hundreds of dollars/euros?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Nov 21, 2013 5:05 pm I doubt it. Even the standard platinum release is 50+$, so I have my doubts that ANYTHING limited is going to be inexpensive.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu Nov 21, 2013 5:50 pm You could try looking at Japanese ecommerce websites for a used copy. Sometimes non-Japanese versions of stuff shows up there but admittedly your chances for something like this will be low. Yahoo Japan Auctions is what they largely use instead over ebay, there's Amazon.jp and I discovered Surugaya , which has a lot of Eva stuff used.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Nov 21, 2013 5:53 pm Oh look - what I've got . But it's £50 already with 3 1/2 days to go. I paid less than that for mine three years ago.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Thu Nov 28, 2013 2:07 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Does anyone know if the North American release has a booklet? I think this is pretty much the only version I don't own.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Thu Nov 28, 2013 2:20 pm I've said this before but the Manga D&R / EoE releases are worth owning for the menus alone.
